name: Riddle Proof
description: OpenClaw wrapper for Riddle Proof evidence-backed agent changes.

network.note: The wrapper itself does not need network egress; configured engine or agent adapters must declare additional egress if added.

agentContext.note: Plugin only sees data explicitly passed to its tool.

tools.note: The wrapper calls reusable logic directly and does not invoke another OpenClaw plugin runtime. The Codex exec adapter only runs when explicitly configured.

secrets.note: No secrets are required by the initial wrapper.

executionMode.description: disabled returns the normalized blocked envelope; engine calls the configured local Riddle Proof engine.

agentMode.description: disabled stops at agent checkpoints; codex_exec uses the local codex CLI as the checkpoint agent.

proofReviewMode.description: codex_exec lets the configured Codex adapter judge proof; main_agent pauses after proof capture so the current OpenClaw agent can inspect the evidence and resume with riddle_proof_review.

defaultMaxIterations.description: Default engine/checkpoint iteration runway. Values below 12 are treated as legacy config and normalized to 12; explicit per-run max_iterations still overrides this default.

defaultRunMode.description: background returns an accepted run state immediately so channel surfaces can watch status without holding the chat turn; blocking waits for tool completion.

autoReviewShipModeNone.description: When proofReviewMode=main_agent and ship_mode resolves to none, automatically advance proof review only when inspection already marks the evidence as a ready-to-ship candidate. This never ships or marks a PR ready.
